creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #4)

They're synonyms but they are in-fact mutually exclusive, so they would need a vertical bar. You'll get confusing output if you try to do `bectl -\?h` because we don't use getopt(3) here; it's just a couple of hand-rolled strcmp() since there's only all of three options (-h, -?, -r) and two of them are synonyms anyways.
